import subprocess
import csv

def process_csv_records(filepath: str):
    with open(filepath, "r") as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        hostnames = [row["hostname"] for row in reader]

    ping_targets = "\n".join(hostnames)
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["fping", "-f", "-"],
        input=ping_targets,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    alive_hosts = set(result.stdout.splitlines())

    with open(filepath, "r") as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        results = []
        for row in reader:
            row["alive"] = row["hostname"] in alive_hosts
            results.append(row)
    return results

def export_users(users: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    user_ids = [u["id"] for u in users]
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["convert_batch", "--input", "-"],
        input="\n".join(user_ids),
        capture_output=True,
    )
    return [f"/tmp/{uid}.pdf" for uid in user_ids]

def validate_batch(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    import json
    payload = json.dumps([r["data"] for r in records])
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["python", "validator.py", "--batch", "-"],
        input=payload,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    flags = result.stdout.strip().split("\n")
    for record, flag in zip(records, flags):
        record["valid"] = flag == "valid"
    return records
